title: Speedy Hopper & Furnace
description: A simple mod that speeds up the hopper transfer time and the furnace burn time
body:
# Speedy Hopper & Furnace
A lightweight, server-side utility mod that increases the speed of item processing in vanilla Furnaces and item transfer in Hoppers. Perfect for improving resource throughput in large-scale farms and automated systems without introducing new blocks.

## What Does This Project Do?
This mod modifies the default behavior of two Block Entities:

Furnaces (All Types): Reduces the required cook time for all crafting recipes processed by Furnaces, Blast Furnaces, and Smokers.

Hoppers: Reduces the internal cooldown delay applied to hoppers, allowing them to pull and push items much faster.

## Config
The mod is configurable in the `speedyhopperfurnace-common.toml` file, or using the `/speedyhopperfurnace` command.
